query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS contrato_id,
  l.nome AS cliente_nome,
  u.name AS corretor_nome,
  e.nome AS equipe_nome,
  c.valorVenda,
  c.createdAt AS data_contrato,
  DATE_FORMAT(c.createdAt, '%Y-%m') AS mes_ano,
  l.status AS lead_status
FROM contratos c
INNER JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
INNER JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC;

  DATE_FORMAT(c.createdAt, '%Y-%m') AS mes_ano,
  l.status AS lead_status
FROM contratos c
INNER JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
INNER JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC;
